Initial commit: Smasher Badminton Club Scoreboard

Features:
- Real-time scoreboard with admin panel and live display
- BWF official badminton rules implementation
- Set timer with configurable duration \(default 25 min\)
- Break timer with 1:30 duration \(configurable\)
- Cross-tab sync using BroadcastChannel API
- Optimized for rapid button clicks
- Responsive design for TV/monitor display
